name: Content Pipeline — Upload → Watermark → AI Captions → Queue

nodes.name: Dashboard Upload Webhook
nodes.notes:
TRIGGERED BY: Dashboard upload button
RESPONSIBILITY: n8n receives upload notification

nodes.name: Media Worker: Batch Process
nodes.notes:
RESPONSIBILITY: Media Worker (HANDS)
Watermark + resize for all platforms via FFmpeg

nodes.name: Poll Media Job Status
nodes.notes:
RESPONSIBILITY: n8n (NERVOUS SYSTEM)
Wait for FFmpeg to finish processing

parameters.name: message
parameters.value:
=Generate social media captions for uploaded content.

Theme: {{ $node['Dashboard Upload Webhook'].json.body.theme || 'General' }}
Brand voice: {{ $node['Dashboard Upload Webhook'].json.body.brandVoice || 'Professional and engaging' }}

Platforms: Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Facebook, WhatsApp

Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown, no code fences) with this exact structure:
{
  "instagram": { "caption": "...", "hashtags": ["#tag1", "#tag2"], "alt_text": "..." },
  "tiktok": { "caption": "...", "hashtags": ["#tag1", "#tag2"], "alt_text": "..." },
  "youtube": { "caption": "...", "hashtags": ["#tag1", "#tag2"], "alt_text": "..." },
  "facebook": { "caption": "...", "hashtags": ["#tag1", "#tag2"], "alt_text": "..." },
  "whatsapp": { "caption": "...", "hashtags": [], "alt_text": "..." }
}

Rules:
- Instagram: Max 2200 chars, 20-30 relevant hashtags, engaging hook
- TikTok: Short punchy caption, trending hashtags, use emojis
- YouTube: SEO-optimized title style, 5-10 hashtags including #shorts
- Facebook: Conversational tone, 3-5 hashtags, ask a question
- WhatsApp: Brief personal message, no hashtags needed

nodes.name: OpenClaw: Generate Captions
nodes.notes:
RESPONSIBILITY: OpenClaw (BRAIN)
AI generates platform-specific captions and hashtags

nodes.name: Insert into Content Queue
nodes.notes:
RESPONSIBILITY: n8n (NERVOUS SYSTEM)
Store generated content in queue for scheduling

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, message: 'Content pipeline started' }) }}
